name: London
vibe: The world city. Infinite museums, markets, and districts to get lost in.

name: Birmingham
vibe: Second city with Europe's best Balti Triangle, buzzing Digbeth arts scene.

name: Manchester
vibe: Northern Quarter coffee shops, free museums, legendary nightlife and football.

name: Liverpool
vibe: Beatles trail, world-class free museums, Albert Dock, Scouse hospitality.

name: Leeds
vibe: Buzzing student city, Victoria Quarter arcades, big night out.

name: Sheffield
vibe: The steel city reborn — indie music scene, craft beer trail, Peak District at your door.

name: Bristol
vibe: Banksy's hometown, Clifton Gorge, harbourside street food, radical independent spirit.

name: Newcastle
vibe: Seven bridges, Baltic gallery, Grainger Town architecture, legendary Geordies.

name: Brighton
vibe: Pebble beach, vintage arcade, pier fish and chips, most colourful city in England.

name: York
vibe: Medieval walls, Viking museum, best independent food scene in the North.

name: Oxford
vibe: Dreaming spires, Bodleian Library, punting on the Cherwell, world-class colleges.

name: Cambridge
vibe: Punt the Backs, King's College Chapel, market square, genuinely beautiful city.

name: Bath
vibe: Roman baths, Royal Crescent, hot springs, Georgian perfection in honey stone.

name: Exeter
vibe: Medieval cathedral, quirky underground passages, gateway to Devon's moors and coast.

name: Plymouth
vibe: Drake's city, Barbican fishing quarter, Sound views, gateway to Cornwall.

name: Bournemouth
vibe: Seven miles of sandy beach, gardens, pier, big student energy.

name: Southampton
vibe: Titanic city, medieval walls, gateway to the Isle of Wight.

name: Portsmouth
vibe: HMS Victory, Spinnaker Tower, naval heritage, Southsea seafront.

name: Norwich
vibe: Most complete medieval city in England, independent quarter, Broads nearby.

name: Nottingham
vibe: Robin Hood country, Nottingham Castle, caves underneath the city.

name: Leicester
vibe: Richard III's resting place, outstanding Golden Mile curry houses, Roman ruins.

name: Coventry
vibe: Cathedral city rebuilt after WWII, a symbol of reconciliation, Herbert Art Gallery.

name: Chester
vibe: Roman walls you can walk, black and white Tudor rows, the Rows shopping galleries.

name: Durham
vibe: Norman cathedral on a rock above the river — the finest ecclesiastical view in England.

name: Harrogate
vibe: Victorian spa town, Betty's tea rooms, Stray parkland, RHS Harlow Carr.

name: Lincoln
vibe: Steep cobbled hill to a stunning triple-towered cathedral, Norman castle.

name: Whitby
vibe: Dracula's abbey, 199 steps, best fish and chips in Britain, gothic charm.

name: Scarborough
vibe: Victorian seaside resort with castle headland, two bays, old-fashioned amusements.

name: Margate
vibe: Turner Contemporary, dreamland amusement park, Tracey Emin country, DFL cool.

name: Folkestone
vibe: Creative quarter, Triennial art festival, cliffs, gateway to Channel Tunnel.

name: Hastings
vibe: Olde town fishing shacks, cliff railway, 1066 battlefield nearby, bohemian.

name: Eastbourne
vibe: Victorian seafront, Beachy Head cliffs, South Downs walks, quieter than Brighton.

name: Rye
vibe: Perfectly preserved hilltop town, cobbles, antiques, tea rooms, quintessentially English.

name: Lewes
vibe: Bonfire Night capital, castle, independent shops, Harvey's brewery, South Downs.

name: Winchester
vibe: Ancient capital of England, stunning cathedral, Round Table, water meadows.

name: Salisbury
vibe: England's tallest spire, Magna Carta original, gateway to Stonehenge.

name: Peterborough
vibe: Magnificent Norman cathedral with Catherine of Aragon's tomb, Flag Fen bronze age site.

name: Ely
vibe: Cathedral rising from the flat Fens like a ship of the Fens — extraordinary.

name: Bury St Edmunds
vibe: Cathedral, Greene King brewery, Georgian streets, Suffolk's most beautiful town.

name: St Ives
vibe: Tate St Ives, Barbara Hepworth, turquoise coves, best light in England.

name: Newquay
vibe: Fistral surf beach, stag do central, but also genuinely stunning Cornish coast.

name: Padstow
vibe: Rick Stein's Padstow, harbour-fresh seafood, coastal path walks, Camel Estuary.

name: Shrewsbury
vibe: Darwin's birthplace, meander-encircled Tudor town, independent shops.

name: Ludlow
vibe: Michelin restaurants per capita — more than London. Castle, cobbles, craft.

name: Cheltenham
vibe: Regency architecture, literature festival, Montpellier gardens, racing festival.

name: Gloucester
vibe: Harry Potter's Hogwarts corridors in the cathedral cloisters, historic docks.

name: Torquay
vibe: English Riviera, palm trees, sandy beaches, Agatha Christie's birthplace.

name: Dartmouth
vibe: Medieval harbour town clinging to steep hills, castle, Royal Naval College.

name: Kingston upon Hull
vibe: Wilberforce slavery museum, independent spirit, 2017 City of Culture.

name: Beverley
vibe: Twin-towered minster, racecourse, Georgian market town — York without the crowds.

name: Reading
vibe: Festival town, Oracle riverside, fast rail to London, good nightlife.

name: Ipswich
vibe: Cardinal Wolsey's birthplace, Wet Dock, Christchurch Mansion art gallery.

name: Penzance
vibe: Tip of England, ferry to the Scilly Isles, sea-bathing pool, wild Atlantic.

name: Glastonbury
vibe: Arthurian legends, Tor mysticism, abbey ruins, world-famous festival nearby.

name: Stamford
vibe: England's finest stone town — Georgian and medieval, used in Middlemarch filming.

name: Lavenham
vibe: Best preserved medieval wool town in England — leaning half-timbered houses.

name: Windsor
vibe: Windsor Castle, Long Walk, Eton, Thames towpaths, easily from Paddington.

name: Thetford
vibe: Ancient Breckland market town — Boudicca's territory, forest drives, Dad's Army filming location.

name: Southwold
vibe: Adnams Brewery, painted beach huts, pier, lighthouse — the Hamptons of Suffolk.

name: Hebden Bridge
vibe: Hippy capital of the North, steep valleys, independent bookshops, canal.

name: Keswick
vibe: Derwentwater on your doorstep, fells for walking, pencil museum, quiet.

name: Windermere
vibe: England's largest lake, steamer trips, Beatrix Potter country, fells.

name: Ambleside
vibe: Lake District walking hub, waterfalls, fells, cosy pubs, Wainwright country.

name: Richmond
vibe: Castle above a gorge, cobbled market square, gateway to the Dales.

name: Derby
vibe: Peak District gateway, Rolls-Royce heritage, Victorian Silk Mill, lively market town feel.

name: Northampton
vibe: Shoe capital of England, medieval market square, canal network, easy from London.

name: Stratford-upon-Avon
vibe: Shakespeare's birthplace, RSC theatre, Tudor architecture, Avon riverside walks.

name: Hereford
vibe: Mappa Mundi, cider country, cattle market, Wye Valley gateway, Black and White villages.

name: Lichfield
vibe: England's only three-spired cathedral, Doctor Johnson's birthplace, elegant Georgian streets.

name: Blackpool
vibe: Tower, illuminations, pleasure beach, hen dos, candy floss — gloriously kitsch seaside.

name: Buxton
vibe: Peak District spa town, Opera House, natural mineral spring, Chatsworth nearby.

name: Bakewell
vibe: Original Bakewell pudding, Peak District market town, Haddon Hall, Chatsworth estate.

name: Skipton
vibe: Gateway to the Yorkshire Dales, medieval castle, canal basin, Pennine walks.

name: Edinburgh
vibe: Castle on a rock, Arthur's Seat, world's biggest arts festival, whisky.

name: Glasgow
vibe: Best music city in the UK, Mackintosh architecture, incredible free galleries.

name: Aberdeen
vibe: Granite city, beach, whisky distilleries nearby, gateway to Cairngorms.

name: Inverness
vibe: Gateway to the NC500, Loch Ness nearby, Highland capital, wild north.

name: St Andrews
vibe: Golf's birthplace, medieval cathedral ruins, university town, East Sands beach.

name: Stirling
vibe: Wallace Monument, castle, battlefields — the key to Scotland's history.

name: Dundee
vibe: V&A Dundee design museum, Discovery ship, surprising food scene, Tay Bridge views.

name: Pitlochry
vibe: Highland gateway, salmon ladder, Festival Theatre, Ben Vrackie walks.

name: Oban
vibe: Seafood capital of Scotland, gateway to Mull and Hebrides, distillery on the hill.

name: Portree
vibe: Coloured harbour houses, Trotternish Ridge, Fairy Pools — Isle of Skye.

name: Fort William
vibe: Ben Nevis, Nevis Range ski, Jacobite steam train, West Highland Way end.

name: Cardiff
vibe: Castle in the city, Victorian arcades, Cardiff Bay regeneration, rugby nation.

name: Swansea
vibe: Dylan Thomas's birthplace, Gower Peninsula beaches, revived city centre.

name: Conwy
vibe: Perfectly intact 13th century town walls and castle, Snowdonia at your back.

name: Caernarfon
vibe: Edward I's mightiest castle, walled town, Snowdonia, Welsh language heartland.

name: Tenby
vibe: Pastel-coloured medieval walled town, four beaches, Pembrokeshire coast path.

name: Betws-y-Coed
vibe: Gateway to Snowdonia, waterfalls, mountain railways, wild Wales.

name: Aberystwyth
vibe: Cliff railway, university town, National Library of Wales, wild coast.

name: Belfast
vibe: Titanic museum, Cathedral Quarter, murals, Game of Thrones filming country.

name: Derry
vibe: Only fully intact walled city in Ireland, rich political history, great music.

name: Dublin
vibe: Guinness, Temple Bar, Trinity College, friendliest pub culture on earth.

name: Cork
vibe: The real capital (ask any Corkonian), English Market, Rory Gallagher Plaza.

name: Galway
vibe: Buskers on every corner, Aran Islands ferry, wild Atlantic Way, Oyster Festival.

name: Killarney
vibe: Ring of Kerry gateway, lakes, jaunting cars, national park, Gap of Dunloe.

name: Kilkenny
vibe: Ireland's medieval capital, Smithwick's brewery, craft scene, hurling heartland.

name: Waterford
vibe: Ireland's oldest city, Viking Triangle, Waterford Crystal factory, harbour.

name: Limerick
vibe: King John's Castle, Hunt Museum, regenerating city, mighty Shannon estuary.

name: Paris
vibe: Croissants, Musée d'Orsay, canal picnics — 2h15 by Eurostar. Skip the Louvre.

name: Lyon
vibe: Gastronomic capital of France, silk weaving history, Fourvière hill, bouchons.

name: Marseille
vibe: Raw and magnificent — bouillabaisse, Calanques sea cliffs, MuCEM, real France.

name: Nice
vibe: Promenade des Anglais, Cours Saleya market, Matisse Museum, Riviera.

name: Bordeaux
vibe: UNESCO wine city, La Cité du Vin, stunning 18th-century Place de la Bourse.

name: Toulouse
vibe: La Ville Rose, Airbus birthplace, Canal du Midi, student energy, violet season.

name: Nantes
vibe: Machines de l'île giant mechanical elephant, Jules Verne's birthplace, oysters.

name: Strasbourg
vibe: EU Parliament city, extraordinary Gothic cathedral, Alsatian old town, Christmas markets.

name: Lille
vibe: 35 min from Brussels, grand Flemish architecture, génièvre gin, fantastic food.

name: Rennes
vibe: Half-timbered medieval quarter, student city, Brittany gateway, crepe central.

name: Biarritz
vibe: Belle Époque resort, surfer town, Grand Plage, Basque country, Pyrenees backdrop.

name: Montpellier
vibe: Fastest growing French city, medieval core, Mediterranean light, tram city.

name: Dijon
vibe: Mustard and Burgundy wine capital, owl trail, magnificent ducal palace.

name: Bruges
vibe: Chocolate-box canals and belfry, 200 beers on tap, lace and chocolate shops.

name: Ghent
vibe: Graffiti Street, Gravensteen castle, triple waterway, less touristy than Bruges.

name: Brussels
vibe: Grand Place, waffles, 1000 beers, EU bubble, Magritte, Art Nouveau architecture.

name: Antwerp
vibe: Fashion capital, diamond trade, Rubens heritage, incredible Art Nouveau, great bars.

name: Amsterdam
vibe: Rijksmuseum, canals by bike, Heineken brewery, craft beer windmill, Jordaan.

name: Rotterdam
vibe: Modern architecture capital of Europe, Markthal, cube houses, port heritage.

name: The Hague
vibe: Peace Palace, Mauritshuis (Girl with Pearl), Scheveningen beach, royal city.

name: Utrecht
vibe: The Dom, canal-level cafes, Dom Tower climb, smaller than Amsterdam, great vibe.

name: Eindhoven
vibe: Dutch Design Week hub, Philips light city, STRP festival, creative energy.

name: Leiden
vibe: Rembrandt's birthplace, 10 museums in one city, canal-town, brilliant market.

name: Delft
vibe: Blue pottery capital, Vermeer's town, gorgeous old centre, Nieuwe Kerk.

name: Berlin
vibe: History on every corner, nightlife that doesn't stop, world-class art, cheap beer.

name: Hamburg
vibe: Reeperbahn music legend, Elbphilharmonie, harbour, fish market at 5am.

name: Munich
vibe: Beer gardens, world-class museums, Alps 40 min away, Oktoberfest all year.

name: Cologne
vibe: Magnificent twin-spired cathedral, Kölsch beer, Roman history, quirky museums.

name: Frankfurt
vibe: Sachsenhausen apple wine quarter, Museum Embankment, surprising old town.

name: Düsseldorf
vibe: Altstadt pub quarter, Japan of Europe, Kö fashion street, art scene.

name: Dresden
vibe: Baroque resurrection — Zwinger, Frauenkirche rebuilt, stunning Elbe views.

name: Leipzig
vibe: Bach's city, where Monday demos ended the GDR, exploding arts scene, cheap.

name: Nuremberg
vibe: Castle above old town, Christkindlesmarkt, bratwurst, Nazi documentation centre.

name: Heidelberg
vibe: Castle ruin above river, Philosopher's Walk, Germany's oldest university, Romantik.

name: Freiburg im Breisgau
vibe: Sunniest city in Germany, Black Forest gateway, eco capital, cathedral market.

name: Vienna
vibe: Schnitzel and Sachertorte, Klimt, Mozart, coffee house culture, imperial beauty.

name: Salzburg
vibe: Sound of Music and Mozart combined — fortress above, baroque below, Alps beyond.

name: Innsbruck
vibe: Olympics twice over, ski in and out of city, Nordkette cable car, Hofburg.

name: Graz
vibe: Schlossberg park on a cliff, best Styrian pumpkin seed oil, armoury, opera.

name: Zurich
vibe: Lake swimming in summer, Alt-Stadt bars, Kunsthaus, trams, expensive but beautiful.

name: Geneva
vibe: Lake Geneva jet d'eau, CERN nearby, Carouge village, international city.

name: Bern
vibe: Covered arcades, Einstein's flat, bear park, Swiss capital that surprises.

name: Lucerne
vibe: Chapel Bridge, lake steamers, Lion Monument, Mount Pilatus cable car.

name: Lausanne
vibe: Olympic Museum, Cathedral on a hill, Lake Geneva waterfront, UNIL university.

name: Stockholm
vibe: 14 islands, ABBA museum, Gamla Stan cobbles, Nobel Prize museum, dark and beautiful.

name: Gothenburg
vibe: Sweden's underrated second city, ferry from Newcastle, fish market, Liseberg park.

name: Malmö
vibe: Turning Torso, Disgusting Food Museum, 20 min train from Copenhagen, diverse.

name: Copenhagen
vibe: Nyhavn, Tivoli, bicycles, New Nordic food on a budget, hygge made physical.

name: Aarhus
vibe: ARoS rainbow panorama, Den Gamle By, Denmark's youngest city, great dining.

name: Oslo
vibe: Fjord on the doorstep, Vigeland Park, Munch Scream, ski trails from the city.

name: Bergen
vibe: Bryggen wharf UNESCO, fish market, Fløibanen funicular, fjord capital.

name: Tromsø
vibe: Northern Lights capital, midnight sun, Arctic Cathedral, husky safaris.

name: Helsinki
vibe: Design District, Senate Square, saunas, Helsinki Cathedral, ferry to Tallinn.

name: Tallinn
vibe: Best-preserved medieval walled city in Europe — cobbles, towers, very affordable.

name: Riga
vibe: Art Nouveau capital, Old Town, Riga Black Balsam, wild nightlife, cheap.

name: Vilnius
vibe: Baroque old town, bohemian Užupis republic, Gediminas Castle, very affordable.

name: Reykjavik
vibe: Northern Lights, hot springs, volcanoes, whale watching, most northerly capital.

name: Madrid
vibe: Prado, Reina Sofía, tapas at 2am, Bernabéu, never sleeps, central plaza.

name: Barcelona
vibe: Gaudí, Gothic Quarter, Barceloneta, tapas, actually warm sea, best city in Europe?

name: Seville
vibe: Cathedral with Columbus's tomb, Alcázar, flamenco, tapas culture, orange trees.

name: Granada
vibe: Alhambra palace, Sacromonte cave flamenco, Sierra Nevada above, free tapas with drinks.

name: Bilbao
vibe: Guggenheim transformed a city, pintxos bars, Casco Viejo, industrial-to-art story.

name: San Sebastián
vibe: Most Michelin stars per square metre on earth, La Concha beach, pintxos crawl.

name: Valencia
vibe: Paella birthplace, City of Arts and Sciences, El Carmen barrio, affordable.

name: Málaga
vibe: Picasso's birthplace, Alcazaba, Soho arts district, best beach resorts.

name: Palma
vibe: Gothic cathedral, Old Town, actually brilliant beyond the resorts, Mallorca.

name: Ibiza Town
vibe: Dalt Vila UNESCO walled town, clubs, crystal coves, yoga retreats — all coexist.

name: Las Palmas
vibe: Year-round beach weather, Vegueta old town, Gran Canaria waves, winter sun.

name: Santa Cruz de Tenerife
vibe: Teide volcano, Carnival, Anaga rainforest, most diverse geography on one island.

name: Alicante
vibe: Castle on a rock above the port, Postiguet beach, Costa Blanca gateway.

name: Lisbon
vibe: Trams, fado, pastéis de nata, viewpoints, Atlantic winds — Europe's bargain capital.

name: Porto
vibe: Port wine caves, azulejo tiles, Livraria Lello bookshop, steeper than San Francisco.

name: Faro
vibe: Gateway to the Algarve, old town walled quarter, lagoon islands, affordable.

name: Braga
vibe: Rome of Portugal — more churches than days of the year, Bom Jesus staircase.

name: Coimbra
vibe: Medieval university on a hill, traditional fado, Joanina Library gilded interior.

name: Funchal
vibe: Madeira's floral capital, cable cars, levada walks, year-round warmth.

name: Rome
vibe: Colosseum, Trevi Fountain, Vatican, carbonara — eternal for good reason.

name: Milan
vibe: Da Vinci's Last Supper, fashion week, aperitivo culture, Duomo, Navigli canals.

name: Florence
vibe: Uffizi, David, Duomo, bistecca fiorentina, rolling Tuscan hills from the Piazzale.

name: Venice
vibe: No cars, no bikes, just boats and bridges. Carnival, Biennale, early morning magic.

name: Naples
vibe: Best pizza on earth (it was invented here), Pompeii nearby, chaotic magnificence.

name: Bologna
vibe: Fat Bologna — ragù birthplace, mortadella, arcaded streets, great student life.

name: Turin
vibe: Holy Shroud, Egyptian Museum, Nutella birthplace, aperitivo capital, Alps views.

name: Genoa
vibe: Caruggi medieval maze, pesto birthplace, Christopher Columbus, hidden Ligurian coast.

name: Palermo
vibe: Arabic-Norman-Baroque architecture, street food, Ballaro market, different Italy.

name: Catania
vibe: Etna's lava beneath Baroque buildings, fish market, granita and brioche at dawn.

name: Bari
vibe: Puglia gateway, old women making orecchiette in doorways, Adriatic seafood.

name: Verona
vibe: Romeo and Juliet's city, Roman Arena opera festival, Piazza Erbe, Adige views.

name: Amalfi
vibe: Precarious coast road, lemons, turquoise sea, limoncello, simply spectacular.

name: Prague
vibe: Charles Bridge, castle, best beer in the world for under £1, weekend paradise.

name: Brno
vibe: Prague without tourists, great nightlife, Špilberk Castle, Moravian wine nearby.

name: Karlovy Vary
vibe: Grand colonnaded spa town, hot springs, film festival, Becherovka birthplace.

name: Warsaw
vibe: Completely rebuilt after WWII, Old Town UNESCO, Chopin, vodka bars, cheap.

name: Kraków
vibe: Wawel Castle, Jewish Kazimierz, pierogi, vodka bars, salt mine day trip.

name: Wrocław
vibe: City of dwarves (400+ miniatures), Market Square, gnome hunt, great nightlife.

name: Gdańsk
vibe: Solidarity birthplace, colourful Hanseatic long market, amber capital, beach nearby.

name: Poznań
vibe: Mechanical goats on the town hall, Old Town Square, Croissant Museum, student.

name: Budapest
vibe: Parliament on the Danube, ruin bars, thermal baths, Chain Bridge, goulash.

name: Bratislava
vibe: Tiny but perfectly formed old town, castle, UFO bridge, 1hr from Vienna.

name: Ljubljana
vibe: Dragon bridges, castle hill, cafe-lined river — most liveable small capital in Europe.

name: Zagreb
vibe: Funicular, Museum of Broken Relationships, excellent cafe culture, Dolac market.

name: Split
vibe: Live inside Diocletian's Palace, island ferries, Croatian coast, Game of Thrones.

name: Dubrovnik
vibe: Pearl of the Adriatic, walk the city walls, King's Landing, stunning even crowded.

name: Mostar
vibe: Stari Most bridge divers, Ottoman bazaar, Neretva river, deeply moving history.

name: Kotor
vibe: Bay fjord, medieval town walls, stray cats, Montenegro's jewel, incredibly cheap.

name: Belgrade
vibe: Europe's party capital — raft clubs on the Danube, fortress, cheapest city in Europe.

name: Bucharest
vibe: Ceaușescu's palace (world's heaviest building), French-influenced boulevards, cheap.

name: Cluj-Napoca
vibe: UNTOLD music festival, vibrant student city, Transylvania gateway, cheap and great.

name: Brașov
vibe: Dracula's castle nearby, Black Church, Saxon walls, Transylvanian Alps walking.

name: Sofia
vibe: Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, Vitosha Mountain visible from centre, very cheap.

name: Athens
vibe: Parthenon on a hill, street art, rooftop bars, Monastiraki flea market, ancient.

name: Thessaloniki
vibe: Greece's cultural capital, Byzantine churches, best food in Greece, White Tower.

name: Heraklion
vibe: Knossos palace, Archaeological Museum, Crete's wild gorges and warm sea.

name: Rhodes Town
vibe: Palace of the Grand Masters, medieval walled city, turquoise sea, warm.

name: Santorini
vibe: Caldera views from Oia, white-domed churches, volcanic beaches, sunset wine.

name: Mykonos
vibe: Little Venice, windmills, paradise beaches, glamorous summer parties.

name: Corfu Town
vibe: Venetian Liston arcades, olive groves, Durrell country, greenest Greek island.

name: Istanbul
vibe: Two continents, Blue Mosque, bazaars, Bosphorus, baklava, endlessly fascinating.

name: İzmir
vibe: Kordon seafront, Ephesus nearby, laid-back Aegean city, Turkey's most liberal.

name: Antalya
vibe: Roman harbour, Kaleiçi old quarter, Turquoise Coast, Taurus Mountains behind.

name: Göreme
vibe: Hot air balloons at dawn, fairy chimneys, cave hotels, underground cities.

name: Bodrum
vibe: Crusader castle, bodrum nightlife, Aegean sailing, yachts, Turkish Riviera.

name: Marrakech
vibe: Djemaa el-Fna chaos, souk labyrinths, riads, Majorelle Garden, Atlas day trips.

name: Fez
vibe: World's largest car-free city, 9000 streets, tanneries, oldest university.

name: Casablanca
vibe: Hassan II Mosque on the Atlantic, Art Deco architecture, real Moroccan city.

name: Tangier
vibe: Gateway of Africa, Beats writers' hangout, medina, Strait of Gibraltar views.

name: Cairo
vibe: Pyramids at Giza, Egyptian Museum, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, Nile, ancient world.

name: Tunis
vibe: Medina UNESCO, Carthage ruins, Sidi Bou Said blue and white village, couscous.

name: Nairobi
vibe: Safari gateway, giraffes in the national park, Karen Blixen museum, vibrant food scene.

name: Cape Town
vibe: Table Mountain, Boulders penguins, wine lands, Boulders Beach, world class.

name: Johannesburg
vibe: Apartheid Museum, Soweto, street art, Maboneng arts district, complex history.

name: Stone Town
vibe: Spice island, coral reefs, Freddie Mercury birthplace, carved doors, dhow sailing.

name: Dubai
vibe: Burj Khalifa, Gold Souk, desert dunes, indoor skiing, everything in excess.

name: Abu Dhabi
vibe: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Louvre Abu Dhabi, Formula 1, calmer than Dubai.

name: Doha
vibe: Museum of Islamic Art, Souq Waqif, corniche, World Cup legacy stadiums.

name: Tel Aviv
vibe: Bauhaus White City, Carmel Market, 24hr clubs, Florentin street art, hummus wars.

name: Amman
vibe: Rainbow Street rooftops, Roman Citadel, falafel, Petra day trip, friendly.

name: New York
vibe: The one, the only. Skyline, Central Park, bagels, yellow cabs, 24hr everything.

name: Los Angeles
vibe: Hollywood, Venice Beach, In-N-Out Burger, canyon hikes, sprawling creativity.

name: Miami
vibe: South Beach Art Deco, Wynwood murals, Cuban food, bass in the pool, warm sea.

name: Chicago
vibe: Architecture boat tour, deep dish pizza, jazz, The Bean, windiest city, blues.

name: San Francisco
vibe: Golden Gate, sourdough, cable cars, Chinatown, tech bohemia, fog.

name: New Orleans
vibe: Jazz on every corner, beignets, Mardi Gras forever, bayou, voodoo, gumbo.

name: Washington DC
vibe: Smithsonian (all free), Lincoln Memorial, cherry blossoms, political power.

name: Boston
vibe: Freedom Trail, Harvard Square, lobster rolls, Revolutionary War, Red Sox.

name: Las Vegas
vibe: The Strip, buffets, shows, neon, Grand Canyon day trip — absurd fun.

name: Seattle
vibe: Pike Place Market, Nirvana birthplace, coffee culture, Space Needle, Mount Rainier.

name: Vancouver
vibe: Mountains into ocean, Stanley Park seawall, sushi, Gastown, skiing 30min.

name: Toronto
vibe: CN Tower, Kensington Market, Niagara Falls day trip, incredibly multicultural.

name: Montréal
vibe: French-English cultural clash, poutine, bagels, jazz festival, cobblestone.

name: Mexico City
vibe: Frida Kahlo, Aztec Zócalo, tacos al pastor, Xochimilco boats, extraordinary food.

name: Cancún
vibe: Turquoise Caribbean, Mayan ruins at Tulum, cenote swimming, party zone.

name: Havana
vibe: Vintage cars, salsa, crumbling Baroque, rum and cigars, frozen in time.

name: Bogotá
vibe: Monserrate pilgrimage, Gold Museum, La Candelaria, incredible street food.

name: Cartagena
vibe: Walled colonial city, Caribbean beaches, coloured balconies, Gabriel García Márquez.

name: Lima
vibe: Best food city in South America, Miraflores cliffs, Larco Museum, Cusco gateway.

name: Cusco
vibe: Inca capital, colonial churches on Inca stones, Machu Picchu gateway, altitude.

vibe: Christ the Redeemer, Copacabana, Ipanema, samba, carnival, caipirinha, capoeira.

name: Buenos Aires
vibe: Tango, Boca colours, steak, Recoleta cemetery, Paris of South America.

name: Santiago
vibe: Andes snowcapped from the city, Lastarria barrio, Andean wine, reliable summers.

name: Mumbai
vibe: Gateway of India, dabbawalas, Bollywood, Dharavi, Colaba, chaos and colour.

name: New Delhi
vibe: Red Fort, Humayun's Tomb, Old Delhi spice market, Lutyens' avenues, street food.

vibe: Pink City, Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, block printing, textiles, Golden Triangle.

name: Panaji
vibe: Portuguese churches, spice farms, beach shacks, electronic music, laid-back.

name: Kathmandu
vibe: Boudhanath stupa, Durbar Square, trekking gateway, prayer flags, altitude prep.
